_doc: MacroTilt 2-axis regime engine. Axis 1 (stress) drives the de-risking decision from MOVE percentile. Axis 2 (yield direction) selects the defensive sleeve when de-risked. Validated 1986-2026 (Sharpe 0.61, max drawdown 35.0% vs SPY's 54.6%). Refreshed weekly Friday 15:45 ET by scripts/compute_macrotilt_engine.py via .github/workflows/macrotilt-engine-daily.yml.

sources.stress_signal: ICE BofA MOVE Index via Yahoo (^MOVE)
sources.stress_signal_pre_2002_proxy: 21-day rolling std of DGS10 daily changes x sqrt(252), Z-standardized (validation only; not used live)
